description: Example authentication flow for Space-Track API. All API requests require a valid session cookie obtained by POSTing credentials to /ajaxauth/login.
notes: Each user must have their own registered Space-Track account at https://www.space-track.org/auth/createAccount
Sharing credentials between users is prohibited and may result in account suspension
The session cookie must be included in all subsequent API requests
There is no API key mechanism — only session-based cookie authentication is supported
